The '''[[thrall]] herder''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] ground vehicle used for controlling [[Chazrach]] slave soldiers. It resembled a giant beetle-like creature with thousands of little feet. The vehicle was equipped with [[dovin basal]]s which intercepted missiles and laser blasts. The void created by the dovin basals could also suck small lifeforms like insects, birds and bats into it. Once a thrall herder was destroyed, the [[Chazrach]] associated with it scattered.

The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] first encountered thrall herders during the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion of Dantooine]].

==Behind the scenes==
The word 'thrall' is also the old Norse/Viking term for slave.
